    My Projects

    Below is an automated list of my GitHub repositories:

    ### [cldr-steven-matison.github.io](https://github.com/cldr-steven-matison/cldr-steven-matison.github.io)

    My github pages for Cloudera

    ⭐ 1
    ### [cldr-steven-matison](https://github.com/cldr-steven-matison/cldr-steven-matison)

    Config files for my GitHub profile.

    ⭐ 0
    ### [DeepFindr](https://github.com/cldr-steven-matison/DeepFindr)

    A local, privacy-first AI knowledge base. Index documents, websites, and GitHub repos — then ask questions and get accurate, sourced answers powered by local LLMs. Desktop app (Electron) + RAG backend (FastAPI/Qdrant) + MCP server for Cursor & Claude Desktop. Everything runs on your machine.

    ⭐ 0
    ### [ClouderaStreamingOperators](https://github.com/cldr-steven-matison/ClouderaStreamingOperators)

    Repo for yaml used in installing Cloudera Streaming Operators

    ⭐ 1
